title: Availability
description: The application will be available on Play store for android users and App store for iOS users

title: Privacy
description: All user’s data will be secured and unavailable to anyone

title: Usability
description: The system should be developed in a user-friendly

title: Hardware Limitations
description: The user must have a smartphone connected to the internet, with a working camera to be able to take pictures of themselves or a photo for the beloved ones from their devices to upload it to the system

title: Security
description: The user registration process the system will encrypt the password when the user login

title: Reliability
description: The user information will be kept in the database and is always up to date it can not lost and always be obtained from the administrator with the user’s permission

title: Standards Compliance
description: Digital Twin Of Human can only runs on Android or IOS operating systems
